ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., pitcher, catcher) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "hits_total" INTEGER /* Total number of hits */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total performance score */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_runs" (
  "hr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home run statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "h_cap" INTEGER /* Home run capacity */,
  "h_cap_total" INTEGER /* Total home run capacity */,
  "longest_home_run" INTEGER /* Longest home run distance in feet */,
  "average_home_run_distance" REAL /* Average home run distance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the home run record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the home run record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_home_runs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_home_runs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_stats" (
  "league_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league statistic */,
  "league" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the statistic (e.g., total hits, total home runs) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league statistic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_junior" (
  "junior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each junior player */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "junior_name" TEXT /* Name of the junior player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the junior player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the junior player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the junior player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the junior player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the junior player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the junior player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the junior player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("junior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_junior_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_junior_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_junior_stats" (
  "junior_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each junior statistic */,
  "junior_id" INTEGER /* ID of the junior player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "hits_total" INTEGER /* Total number of hits */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total performance score */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the junior statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the junior statistic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("junior_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_junior_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_junior_stats_junior_id FOREIGN KEY ("junior_id") REFERENCES players_junior ("junior_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
